ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the citizen */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the citizen (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc, Private) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the citizen (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad, 11th) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the citizen (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the citizen (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial, Handlers-cleaners) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the citizen (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband, Wife) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the citizen (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the citizen (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the citizen */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the citizen */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the citizen */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the citizen (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_collection_methods table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES incomes ("income_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad, 11th) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the education level (e.g., high school, bachelor's, master's) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the education level (e.g., associate's, doctoral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the marital status (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial, Handlers-cleaners) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation (e.g., management, service, sales) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the occupation (e.g., executive, administrative, food service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband, Wife) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of the income level (e.g., <=50000, >50000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "data_collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., survey, census data, administrative records) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_collection_methods table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "data_collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., survey, census data, administrative records) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, policymaker) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)
